title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: JACKSON COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient mental health services such as individual and family therapy. Sessions may be both individual or in group settings. Also provides mental health assessments. 140 S Holly Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 774-8201 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 774-8201 Scheduling and Business Line (541) 774-3333 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information, or walk in for intake assessment FEES: Accepts OHP OpenCard, Medicare and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. No one is turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information and guardianship documentation. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Between Holly and Ivy Streets off W 8th Avenue Services: Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - JACKSON COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SYRINGE EXCHANGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JACKSON COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH
